  "findings": [
    "Wrong oil type used for the compressor",
    "Incompatible lubricant can cause chemical breakdown, seal failure, and compressor seizure"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop operating the A/C system immediately",
    "Recover refrigerant according to EPA 609 guidelines",
    "Flush the entire A/C system to remove the incorrect oil",
    "Replace the receiver-drier/accumulator and compressor if damage has occurred",
    "Recharge with the correct OEM-specified oil and refrigerant"
  ],
  "rationale": "Using the wrong oil type (e.g., PAG instead of POE in a hybrid/electric compressor, or incorrect viscosity) leads to poor lubrication, chemical incompatibility with seals, loss of dielectric properties in electric compressors, and eventual catastrophic compressor failure.",
  "references": [
    "EPA Section 609",
    "OEM Compressor Lubricant Specifications"
  ]
}
